title: Epic Knights of TerraFirma
description: Adds full compatibility between "Epic Knights: Shields Armor and Weapons" and TerraFirmaCraft
body:
![main pic of the mod - army marching with label Knights of TerraFirma](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca52f9e26c7ed600d183078fa39ffc875678b6f_0.webp)

![Description label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d2057598149db8188d3afb32cce6c4c61bb4043_0.webp)

This mod aims to make **[Epic Knights: Shields, Armor and Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons)** and its addons be compatible with **[TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft)** as much as possible. As of version **3.0**, **Epic Knights of TerraFirma** contains **_900+_** items, including _Weapons_, _Shields_ and _Armor_ in all the materials available in **TFC** survival. Assets from **Epic Knights** and **Epic Knights: Antique Legacy** are reworked to match **TFC** artstyle, and corresponding items are rebalanced to fit the **TFC** gameplay. Armor stats are customisable via config! 

![Compatibilities label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b22c67994d3b46ed66afb97e6a5c9163c84f79_0.webp)

As of version **3.0**, **Epic Knights of TerraFirma** mod supports **[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)** out of the box, and likely shouldn't cause any issues with any other mod.

Current roadmap looks like this, lol:

- Add support for Epic Knights Addon


however, it won't come any time soon. 

![Special thanks label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a84643a2edbdd8f5fbf9f13901f2bbffe9b578e_0.webp)

I would like to wholeheartedly thank **Magistu** for being ready to answer every question about his mod's "inners", **SomeIdiot13** (real discord nickname at this moment) for debugging and testing my mod, **StaxiHD** for helping with textures and Deutsch translation and **MrHiTech** for creating such an awesome datapack which eventually turned into this mod. Additional thanks goes to **Yappit1**, **Seagullible**, **sossololpipi** for testing and debugging my mod while playing at [TerraFirmaCultures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmacultures-s2).
